description_long: This object is a vintage-style briefcase with a hard, rectangular shell covered in dark brown leather or leather-like material, reinforced with black metal or plastic edges. The lid is open, revealing a complex interior featuring a large green circular display, a speaker grille, and an array of black rotary dials and switches, suggesting it is a specialized electronic device, possibly for communication or encryption. Several colored cables and wires are visible, connecting the components inside. The handle is metallic and robust, attached to the front for easy carrying. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with no visible brand markings or external pockets. The overall construction appears sturdy and designed for portability and protection of sensitive equipment.
description: A vintage, hard-shell brown briefcase with black trim, featuring an open lid that reveals a complex electronic device with a green display, dials, and cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid with a green circular display, speaker grille, and a panel of dials and switches inside the briefcase.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the briefcase and the protruding cables and interior components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, smooth brown exterior of the closed lid with black trim and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open lid, interior wiring, and the profile of the electronic panel inside.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed rectangular metal handle attached to the front with metal brackets; rigid and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two small metal latches on the front edge for securing the lid; no visible combination or key lock.
attribute_corner_reinforcements: Black plastic or metal corner caps on all edges for protection.
